## 🔄 Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change fixing an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change adding functionality)
- [ ] 📈 Performance improvement
- [ ] 🔧 Configuration change
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] ♻️ Code refactoring
- [ ] 🧪 Test addition/modification

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the code style of this project ([CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md#code-style))
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests passed locally with my changes
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published
- [ ] I have followed the [commit convention](../CONTRIBUTING.md#commit-convention)

<details>
<summary><b>Contributor Notes</b></summary>

Thank you for contributing to TerraVision! 🌍

Before submitting:
1. Ensure your branch is up-to-date with `main`
2. Run `mvn clean package` locally
3. Test with `mvn javafx:run`
4. Verify code style compliance

See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for full guidelines.

</details>
